recommendations.title: Godzilla vs. Biollante
recommendations.overview: After the previous Godzilla attack, a miniature arms race ensues to collect his cells. Concerned over Godzilla's possible return, the Japanese government uses the cells to create a new bio-weapon, ANEB (Anti-Nuclear Energy Bacteria). They seeks the a

recommendations.title: No One Will Save You
recommendations.overview: A lonely woman battles extraterrestrials who threaten her future while forcing her to face her past.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: The Ugly Stepsister
recommendations.overview: In a fairy-tale kingdom where beauty is a brutal business, Elvira battles to compete with her incredibly beautiful stepsister, and she will go to any length to catch the prince’s eye.

recommendations.title: Phase IV
recommendations.overview: Arizona ants mock the food chain on their way to a desert lab to get two scientists and a woman.

recommendations.title: Eden Log
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: A man wakes up deep inside a cave. Suffering amnesia, he has no recollection of how he came to be here or of what happened to the man whose body he finds beside him. Tailed by a mysterious creature, he must continue through this strange and fantastic

recommendations.title: Kill Switch
recommendations.overview: A pilot battles to save his family and the planet after an experiment for unlimited energy goes wrong.

recommendations.title: Primer
recommendations.overview: A group of fledgling inventors discover a complex method to manipulate reality. At first, they successfully game the stock market with it, but the consequences of the invention start to catch up with them.

recommendations.title: The Platform
recommendations.overview: A slab of food descends down a vertical facility. The residents above eat heartily, leaving those below starving and desperate. A rebellion is imminent.

recommendations.title: Here Alone
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to survive on her own in the wake of a mysterious epidemic, which has decimated society and forced her deep into the unforgiving wild.
